label: FAIL
rationale: TPerInfo preconfiguration sets ProgrammaticResetEnable to FALSE, and the source says FALSE means TPER_RESET is not enabled. A disabled TPER_RESET SHALL be aborted at the interface level, so target SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The trajectory successfully sets TPerInfo column 8, ProgrammaticResetEnable, to 1 before the target. The source says TRUE enables TPER_RESET and an enabled TPER_RESET SHALL be accepted and acknowledged at the interface level, matching target SUCCESS.

label: FAIL
rationale: After ProgrammaticResetEnable is set true, the trajectory opens a session and then TPerReset succeeds. The source requires an enabled reset to abort all open sessions before the next command, so the following Get succeeding without a new StartSession is not compliant.
